settings.heading: Last-Minute Trophy Orders — Fast Help for Tight Deadlines
settings.subheading: Event in a few days? We prioritise ready stock, quick engraving and expedited dispatch to get trophies and medals to you on time. Tell us the date — we'll tell you what's possible.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: For last-minute trophy and medal orders, Meru Trophy prioritises ready stock, simple engraving and expedited dispatch — often delivering to major cities within a couple of days. Tell us your date on WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252) and we'll confirm what's achievable.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.text: When an event sneaks up, we focus on what can be done fast: ready medals and standard cups, simple engraving, and same-day pickup or priority courier. We'll look at your date and city and give you an honest answer immediately — and a plan to make it. Highly customised crystal needs more lead time, but there's almost always a great option that fits your deadline.

settings.title: Ready-stock priority
settings.text: Medals and standard cups that ship immediately.

settings.title: Same-day pickup
settings.text: Collect in Bangalore today for ready items.

settings.title: Honest answers fast
settings.text: We tell you what your date allows, right away.

settings.title: Message your deadline
settings.text: WhatsApp the date, city, items and quantity now.

settings.title: Get a fast plan
settings.text: We confirm ready options and a realistic ETA.

settings.title: Approve & pay quickly
settings.text: Quick proof and advance to lock it in.

settings.question: How fast can you deliver?
settings.answer: Ready and simply-engraved items often reach major cities in about 2 days; same-day pickup in Bangalore.

settings.question: What's quickest for a tight deadline?
settings.answer: Medals and standard cups with simple engraving turn around fastest.

settings.question: Can you do custom crystal last-minute?
settings.answer: Heavily customised crystal needs more time; we'll suggest the best fast alternative.

settings.question: How do I start?
settings.answer: WhatsApp +91 78922 07252 with your date and requirement — we'll respond immediately.

settings.heading: Ready to start?
settings.text: Message us your requirement and event date — we'll guide you through and quote, usually within the hour.
